LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_QComboWindow: Open a short Q combo acceptance window after casting.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_HotkeyOverride: Temporarily replace a hotkey ability with another specific ability.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_FollowupCooldownG: Apply an extra cooldown gate to a chosen followup hotkey.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_SmartJump: Smart jump that finds a valid landing cell and can fire effects after landing.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_EShortJump: Short jump variant, useful for quick reposition skills.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_RStackDetonation: Track R stacks and detonate once the required stack count is reached.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_PeriodicPulse: Repeatedly emit pulse effects during a short duration.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_KillRefresh: Refresh part of a hotkey cooldown when this ability kills a target.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_ShieldAbsorb: Absorb incoming damage, then convert stored value into heal or bonus damage.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_ChainBounce: Make the effect bounce across nearby enemy targets.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_ExecuteBonusDamag: Deal extra damage to low-health targets.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_MissingHealthBonu: Deal scaling extra damage based on target missing health.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_FullHealthBonusDa: Deal extra damage to nearly full-health targets.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_NearbyEnemyBonusD: Deal extra damage when more enemies are clustered near the target.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_IsolatedTargetBon: Deal extra damage to isolated targets.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_MarkDetonation: Apply marks on hit and trigger a detonation at max stacks.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_ComboStacks: Accumulate combo stacks that increase subsequent damage.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_HitSlowField: Create a slow field on hit around the target area.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_PierceBonusDamage: Gain extra damage when more enemies line up for piercing behavior.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_DashEmpoweredStri: Empower the next strike after a dash or jump.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_HitHeal: Heal the caster when this ability successfully hits a target.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_HitCooldownRefund: Refund part of a chosen hotkey cooldown on hit.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_FlightState: Apply a fake flight stance state with visual flight behavior.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_FlightOnlyFollowu: Only usable while the caster is in a real PawnFlyer flight window.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_VanillaPawnFlyer: Launch a real RimWorld 1.6 PawnFlyer instead of a fake flight stance.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_FlightLandingBurs: Trigger a landing burst when the real flight ends.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_ProjectileSplit: Split into additional follow-up hits against nearby targets.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_DuplicateSingletonBloc: {0} already exists; duplicate singleton-like runtime components are blocked.
